theme_and_archetype.rationale: The domain is academic research in Food Science, specifically focused on Gotu Kola leaves (botany/nutrition). A light, earthy theme creates a calm, focused, and trustworthy academic environment, avoiding the cold clinical feel of standard SaaS apps.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID (for Dashboards) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Density and scanability are prioritized.
layout_and_spacing.container_rules: Containers with borders must use internal padding p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-lg) for cards and inputs to keep the UI feeling sharp and technical.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows: shadow-sm or shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] for elevated elements. Avoid heavy drop shadows.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border (border-default), no shadow by default. Hover states bring a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.header_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism over scrolling content: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F9F6]/80 with a delicate 1px inner stroke border-b border-[#E2E5DE].
surface_strategies.editor_canvas: Pure white background, prominent drop shadow to simulate a physical paper on top of the base dashboard background.

component_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons use #4A6B46 background with white text. Apply transition-transform duration-200 hover:-translate-y-[1px]. Avoid full pill shapes; stick to rounded-md or rounded-lg.
component_instructions.inputs: Use Shadcn Input. Background pure white, subtle border. On focus: ring-2 ring-primary/20 border-primary.
component_instructions.cards: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout bento-boxes, Shadcn for strict data tables. Card-less approaches preferred for data grids. Minimal visual noise.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts/Shadcn Charts. Use the custom color palette (Primary, Accent, Status) for data visualization series to maintain the Earthy archetype. Avoid defaults.
component_instructions.chat_interface: AI Advisor chat should use soft chat bubbles. AI responses use surface_alt background, user responses use primary_light background. Include 'data-testid' for all inputs and send buttons.
component_instructions.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Must have a backdrop-blur overlay.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text and background color on hover. e.g., hover:bg-[#3C5739] hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion for subtle fade-in on mount. Initial: opacity-0, y-4. Animate: opacity-100, y-0. Transition: duration 0.4s ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: Lists and bento grid items should stagger in on load.

media_and_assets.icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight preferred to match the elegant organic theme).

ai_advisor_avatar.description: Minimalist flat vector avatar of a friendly academic professor (Dosen Pembimbing). Use for chat interface.

dashboard_hero_bg.description: Abstract minimalist organic wave background, inspired by centella asiatica leaves. Light warm sand and pale sage green colors. Use for login/onboarding or header background.

botanical_texture.description: Green leaves texture for abstract branding areas or card imagery if required.

library_architecture.description: Clean, sleek library architecture for academic mood setting (e.g., in an empty state or reference manager).

domain_specific_instructions.language: All UI elements must be in Bahasa Indonesia (e.g., 'Beranda', 'Kalkulator Statistik', 'Editor Tesis', 'Dosen Pembimbing AI', 'Manajer Referensi').
domain_specific_instructions.thesis_focus: The dashboard must support data entry and visualization for 'Analisis Fisikokimia Bubur Instan Daun Pegagan'. Include specific placeholder terms in mockups like 'Kadar Air', 'Kadar Abu', 'Serat Kasar', 'Uji Organoleptik'.
domain_specific_instructions.statistical_tools: ANOVA and DMRT calculators should use a strict, dense table layout for data entry, prioritizing clarity over decoration.

testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='kalkulator-submit-button').
